properties.name: grails.cache.enabled
properties.description: Whether the cache plugin is enabled.

properties.name: grails.cache.clearAtStartup
properties.description: Whether to clear all caches when the application starts.

properties.name: grails.cache.cacheManager
properties.description: The cache manager implementation class name. Use `GrailsConcurrentLinkedMapCacheManager` for bounded caches with maxCapacity support.

properties.name: grails.cache.caches
properties.description: Map of cache-specific configurations keyed by cache name, each supporting a `maxCapacity` setting (used by GrailsConcurrentLinkedMapCacheManager).

properties.name: grails.cache.ehcache.ehcacheXmlLocation
properties.description: Location of the Ehcache XML configuration file on the classpath.

properties.name: grails.cache.ehcache.lockTimeout
properties.description: The timeout in milliseconds for acquiring a lock on a cache element.
